She reportedly dumped his body in a well and remarried without informing her second husband about the child. Her former husband's missing person complaint led to her apprehension and confession.

description: Jaipur police swiftly apprehended one suspect and detained a minor following the alleged harassment of a Japanese tourist near Jaigarh Fort.  A manhunt is underway for three other identified individuals involved in the Sunday morning incident.  Authorities are prioritizing swift prosecution, with over 50 CCTV footages scanned and technical surveillance employed to track the remaining accused.

Deepika Padukone breaks 'silent treatment' on Dhurandhar 2
description: Amid chatter around her absence from the screening of Dhurandhar: The Revenge, Deepika Padukone has finally addressed speculation surrounding her “silence” on husband Ranveer Singh’s latest blockbuster. The sequel, which hit theatres on March 19, has been receiving praise from both audiences and industry insiders, with Ranveer’s performance drawing particular acclaim. However, fans had been questioning why Deepika hadn’t publicly reacted to the film’s success or attended its Mumbai screening.

description: A promising Indian student, Nilam Shinde, pursuing her MS in engineering in California, tragically passed away after being hit by a speeding vehicle. Despite her father's visa struggles and her comatose state, Nilam's organs were donated with his consent. Her funeral was held in California following Hindu rituals.

This breakthrough signals a crucial step towards full-scale power generation and enhances India's fuel self-reliance, positioning it among nations with advanced breeder reactor technology.

2 kids die after eating dosa from store bought batter: What went wrong, safety tips
description: Two young girls tragically died in Ahmedabad after consuming dosa made from store-bought fermented batter. The family fell ill with severe vomiting, leading to the deaths of the children while the parents remain hospitalized. Authorities have collected batter samples for analysis following the suspected food poisoning incident.

title: Canada has changed immigration rules; changing visa fee, work permit rules and more
description: Canada's immigration landscape is shifting in April 2026 with increased passport and citizenship fees, offset by a 30-day processing guarantee. Super visa rules are relaxed, allowing sponsors more flexibility. Provinces gain more control over candidate assessment, and rural employers can hire more foreign workers. Saskatchewan introduces new application fees for its nominee program.
